report.summary: Drafted 3 new social posts (#122-124) covering the CLARITY Act stablecoin yield breakthrough (Tillis-Alsobrooks bipartisan deal), $13.5B quarterly options expiry on March 27, and Fear & Greed Day 51 all-time record with historical recovery data. Updated newsletter v23 with CLARITY Act + options expiry addendum. Created content calendar v31 (3 new posts Wed-Thu). Built 3 SVG social cards (CLARITY Act deal layout, options expiry volatility alert, Fear & Greed Day 51 historical comparison). Key narrative: legislative clarity + massive derivatives expiry converging with record-length fear streak — the setup for a potential regime change.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #122: CLARITY Act Stablecoin Yield Deal — Tillis-Alsobrooks compromise (passive yield banned, activity rewards allowed), White House backed, Banking Committee markup late April, Senate vote May-June, 60 votes needed. CTA to crypto-regulations-2026 (scheduled Wed Mar 26 9AM ET)

Tweet #123: $13.5B Options Expiry — quarterly quadruple witching on Deribit Mar 27, BTC ~$9.2B + ETH ~$4.3B, historical post-expiry swings 8-15%, BTC range-bound at $70K with F&G 11. CTA to options-calculator (scheduled Wed Mar 26 1PM ET)

Tweet #124: Fear & Greed Day 51 Thread — all-time record extending, comparison to COVID 2020 (28 days, then +130%) and LUNA/3AC 2022 (41 days, then +45%), Glassnode data +18% avg 30-day return on entries below 25. CTA to fear-greed-timeline (scheduled Thu Mar 27 10AM ET)
Newsletter v23 addendum v4: CLARITY Act deal explainer + $13.5B options expiry volatility preview
Content calendar v31: 3 new posts (Wed-Thu) + Discord volatility alert for Thu morning

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: CLARITY Act Deal — green/red banned vs allowed layout, Tillis-Alsobrooks attribution, timeline panel (April markup, May-June vote, 60 senators), bottom stats ($304B stablecoins, 99% resolved, FIT21+ path, bipartisan)

SVG social card: $13.5B Options Expiry — amber volatility theme, BTC/ETH breakdown ($9.2B/$4.3B), historical post-expiry moves (Dec +12%, Sep -8%, Jun +15%), current conditions panel (BTC $70K, F&G 11 Day 51, 2 days countdown)
SVG social card: Fear & Greed Day 51 — giant DAY 51 with fear gradient, 3 comparison cards (2020 COVID 28 days/+130%, 2022 LUNA 41 days/+45%, 2026 NOW 51 days), Glassnode +18% avg return callout

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: BREAKOUT: CLARITY Act stablecoin yield deal — first major bipartisan crypto legislation breakthrough of 2026. Regulations guide should see surge in search traffic.
CATALYST: $13.5B quarterly options expiry Thursday Mar 27 — the single biggest near-term volatility event. Options calculator page positioned perfectly.
PEAK: Fear & Greed Day 51 — every day extends our unique ownership of 'extreme fear record' search queries. No competitor has this data asset.
SURGING: Institutional divergence narrative intensifying — Bitmine 3.86% of ETH supply, MS MSBT, $2.5B ETF inflows all building.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides — 20 days to April 15 deadline. Peak search volume window closing fast.
BLOCKED: 170+ pages stuck behind git lock. Every undeployed day = lost indexing for queued content.
